summary: On April 8-9, 2026, Rubicon Center operators reported destroying 90 targets on April 9 and 173 on April 8, including Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs and personnel, across the Donbas, Krasny Liman, and Belgorod directions, while coordinating with Russian Aerospace Forces. Russian forces used the "Elka" and "Yolka" anti-aircraft drones to kinetically intercept Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs, with one "Yolka" strike causing a Ukrainian "Hornet" UAV's warhead to detonate. Ukrainian forces employed FPV drones to target Russian soldiers, including those using motorcycles or feigning surrender, and used electronic warfare to force FPV drone landings, while Russian forces increased antenna sizes on their electronic warfare systems. Separately, Tyumen State University recruited students into drone units under the guise of avoiding mandatory military service, and South Korean company DAON unveiled the SWARM-X military drone lineup, including the XV600 tactical drone capable of changing color and flight mode.
